name: Brown, Robert V.
major: College of Liberal Arts
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Caffey, Shed Hill
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
clubs: President of Phi Sigma Literary Society
description: The striking thing about Shed Hill Caffey is that he continues to be an active leader in all organizations and a conscientious and untiring student without sacrificing one whit his ability to hold enthralled the hearts of all with whom he comes in contact.
text: The striking thing about Shed Hill Caffey is that he continues to be an active leader in all organizations and a conscientious and untiring student without sacrificing one whit his ability to hold enthralled the hearts of all with whom he comes in contact.

name: Calloway, Carmen
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Carmen is a good student and has many attractive and sterling qualities. Although of a rather serious turn of mind, she has a great influence over those with whom she comes in contact.
text: Carmen is a good student and has many attractive and sterling qualities. Although of a rather serious turn of mind, she has a great influence over those with whom she comes in contact.

name: Cook, Rebecca
major: College of Liberal Arts
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Desporte, Ernestine
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Her ability to adapt herself to her environment is certainly an asset we like. In spite of her having been here only one year, her friendliness and ready smile have made her one of our best liked Co-eds.
text: Her ability to adapt herself to her environment is certainly an asset we like. In spite of her having been here only one year, her friendliness and ready smile have made her one of our best liked Co-eds.

name: Eubanks, Frances Hudson
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Well, maybe so, but that is not all. Her grades will prove much more. Her friendly disposition is the medium by which she left a host of friends at M. S. C. W., and that same factor has caused her to have many at Ole Miss.
text: Well, maybe so, but that is not all. Her grades will prove much more. Her friendly disposition is the medium by which she left a host of friends at M. S. C. W., and that same factor has caused her to have many at Ole Miss.

name: Fatherree, T. J.
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Jeff is a quiet and unassuming lad, but a distinguished student and a polished gentleman. His work upon the weekly publication has been meritorious during the last three years. His ability is shown by his completion of the college course in three years.
text: Jeff is a quiet and unassuming lad, but a distinguished student and a polished gentleman. His work upon the weekly publication has been meritorious during the last three years. His ability is shown by his completion of the college course in three years.

name: Gathings, Eddie
major: College of Liberal Arts
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Hyatt, Elsie Adele
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Here is an active, wide-awake Senior who does things well and doesn't fuss about having much to do. Elsie is a good chum and an indispensable acquaintance because of her friendliness and good nature.
text: Here is an active, wide-awake Senior who does things well and doesn't fuss about having much to do. Elsie is a good chum and an indispensable acquaintance because of her friendliness and good nature.

name: Jones, Ernest Peyton
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: We are mighty glad Ernest will be with us a few more years, because after he gets his degree, he will make a hole in one with his law.
text: We are mighty glad Ernest will be with us a few more years, because after he gets his degree, he will make a hole in one with his law.

name: Jones, Mercer Davie
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Mercer has run away with scholastic honors since he entered Ole Miss. Scorning a grade less than an "A," he has drawn the attention of the faculty and now seems to have aspirations to join it.
text: Mercer has run away with scholastic honors since he entered Ole Miss. Scorning a grade less than an "A," he has drawn the attention of the faculty and now seems to have aspirations to join it.

name: Lamar, Ruby Ethelyn
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Staunch and true, capable and studious, gentle and dignified, Ruby has made herself a permanent place in the hearts of those who have been fortunate enough to be her friends.
text: Staunch and true, capable and studious, gentle and dignified, Ruby has made herself a permanent place in the hearts of those who have been fortunate enough to be her friends.

name: Lenoir, James Jefferson
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Jimmie stands at the head of the class of '27 and merits the position. Sincere, studious, level-headed, original, and determined, he stands for the best that Ole Miss has to offer.
text: Jimmie stands at the head of the class of '27 and merits the position. Sincere, studious, level-headed, original, and determined, he stands for the best that Ole Miss has to offer.

name: McInnis, Bessie G.
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Her artistic sense of beauty makes her very useful wherever she goes. Bessie is ready and willing to work, and does with pleasure anything that may be assigned to her.
text: Her artistic sense of beauty makes her very useful wherever she goes. Bessie is ready and willing to work, and does with pleasure anything that may be assigned to her.

name: McMillan, Lucy Mae
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Lucy Mae came to Ole Miss with the idea of getting an education and she has done it. Loyal, sweet, and always friendly, Lucy Mae has endeared herself to all who know her.
text: Lucy Mae came to Ole Miss with the idea of getting an education and she has done it. Loyal, sweet, and always friendly, Lucy Mae has endeared herself to all who know her.

name: Marshall, Edward Herbert
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Eddie is thoroughly at home both on the diamond and at the “coop.” Both the athletic and social sides of Ole Miss will lose a star in him.
text: Eddie is thoroughly at home both on the diamond and at the “coop.” Both the athletic and social sides of Ole Miss will lose a star in him.

name: May, Wilimetta
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Her cool head and common sense have won for Wilimetta quite a number of friends who will stick by her throughout life.
text: Her cool head and common sense have won for Wilimetta quite a number of friends who will stick by her throughout life.

name: Miller, Dorothy
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
clubs: Social Chairman, Y. W. C. A., 4
description: "Baby Love" has a number of admirable qualities not the least of which is her executive ability. She has succeeded in devastating many hearts, and been an able assistant in editing the annual.
text: "Baby Love" has a number of admirable qualities not the least of which is her executive ability. She has succeeded in devastating many hearts, and been an able assistant in editing the annual.

name: Murphy, Spencer Leroy Jr.
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Spencer has won the thick-soled buskins of Plautus and revelled in the classics to quite an extent. We predict for him real success in the world of classical literature.
text: Spencer has won the thick-soled buskins of Plautus and revelled in the classics to quite an extent. We predict for him real success in the world of classical literature.

name: Phillips, Margaret
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Margaret is another of those girls who have held themselves in such reserve that we feel that we scarcely know her at all. However, those who have had classes with her could not fail to notice that her work was above reproach.
text: Margaret is another of those girls who have held themselves in such reserve that we feel that we scarcely know her at all. However, those who have had classes with her could not fail to notice that her work was above reproach.

name: Conner, Mae Scott
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: She is happy-go-lucky and yet a conscientious student. Her cheerful manner and amiable personality have made her liked by everyone.
text: She is happy-go-lucky and yet a conscientious student. Her cheerful manner and amiable personality have made her liked by everyone.

name: Scott, Maurice Walter
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: Scott is known on the campus as a true, conscientious student, and on the cinder path as a runner without a peer. Scott will run the race of life in the same manner that he ran the races for his Alma Mater.
text: Scott is known on the campus as a true, conscientious student, and on the cinder path as a runner without a peer. Scott will run the race of life in the same manner that he ran the races for his Alma Mater.

name: Shields, Anna E.
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: She is a most capable Student Government President, succeeding in not only keeping law and order among the Co-eds, but their respect and friendship as well. She is a good student and a loyal friend.
text: She is a most capable Student Government President, succeeding in not only keeping law and order among the Co-eds, but their respect and friendship as well. She is a good student and a loyal friend.

name: Smith, Omar Dyke
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
description: He is one of the Oxford boys whom we never have the pleasure of seeing much. He is a good student and a likable fellow.
text: He is one of the Oxford boys whom we never have the pleasure of seeing much. He is a good student and a likable fellow.

name: Smythe, Mack
major: Bachelor of Arts, College of Liberal Arts
clubs: Board of Directors, Y. M. C. A.
description: Mack is one of the hardest and most successful working boys at Ole Miss. He has been an asset to every department of endeavor which he has entered and with such practice need have no fear of the world.
text: Mack is one of the hardest and most successful working boys at Ole Miss. He has been an asset to every department of endeavor which he has entered and with such practice need have no fear of the world.

name: Thomas, James Grady
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: We are sure that this man will make a success of whatever he goes into. He has not only made a good record here as a student, but gained many good friends as well.
text: We are sure that this man will make a success of whatever he goes into. He has not only made a good record here as a student, but gained many good friends as well.

name: Thompson, Allen Cavett
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Allen, with his winning smile and cheery "hello," is going to continue in law here at Ole Miss. We hope he will raise as good a racket in the law courts as he has on the tennis courts.
text:
"That Tennis Wizard"
Allen, with his winning smile and cheery "hello," is going to continue in law here at Ole Miss. We hope he will raise as good a racket in the law courts as he has on the tennis courts.

name: Thompson, John Hodge
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Hodge is the last of the three famous Thompson brothers. He has the combined talent of the other two and we can easily say that the sky is the limit of success with such as he.
text: Hodge is the last of the three famous Thompson brothers. He has the combined talent of the other two and we can easily say that the sky is the limit of success with such as he.

name: Tindall, Marianne
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Marianne expresses a preference in English for Shakespeare. She has many attractive and friendly traits and one cannot help admiring and loving her.
text: Marianne expresses a preference in English for Shakespeare. She has many attractive and friendly traits and one cannot help admiring and loving her.

name: Watts, Eva Mae
major: Bachelor of Arts, COLLEGE OF LIBERAL ARTS
description: Her good humor and ready smile, with her charming personality, have assisted her in acquiring numerous lifelong friends.
text: Her good humor and ready smile, with her charming personality, have assisted her in acquiring numerous lifelong friends.

name: Wright, Lawrence Carter
major: College of Liberal Arts
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Boyles, W. F.
major: School of Commerce
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Johnson, Eloise
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, SCHOOL OF COMMERCE
description: Charming, dignified, dependable—all seem to have a very special meaning when applied to Eloise, for she makes those simple adjectives really mean something.
text: Charming, dignified, dependable—all seem to have a very special meaning when applied to Eloise, for she makes those simple adjectives really mean something.

name: Loper, Carl
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, SCHOOL OF COMMERCE
description: After serving a term at A. & M. Carl has completely exonerated himself of such a misdemeanor by proving himself a true son of Ole Miss. Friendly and steady, he is known to be reliable at all times.
text: After serving a term at A. & M. Carl has completely exonerated himself of such a misdemeanor by proving himself a true son of Ole Miss. Friendly and steady, he is known to be reliable at all times.

name: Marshall, Thomas Cameron
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, SCHOOL OF COMMERCE
description: A wizard of the diamond and a master of finance—that's Tommie. Needless to say, everybody likes him and in any kind of financial statement, he would be considered an asset.
text: A wizard of the diamond and a master of finance—that's Tommie. Needless to say, everybody likes him and in any kind of financial statement, he would be considered an asset.

name: Miller, Chester Ernest
major: Bachelor of Science in Commerce, SCHOOL OF COMMERCE
description: "Chesty" has so many friends it would be difficult for him to count all of them. Everyone finds him bright and cheerful. He has been a great success on the campus and we wish him an even greater one in the business world.
text: "Chesty" has so many friends it would be difficult for him to count all of them. Everyone finds him bright and cheerful. He has been a great success on the campus and we wish him an even greater one in the business world.

name: Nunnery, John Robert
major: School of Commerce
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Brown, Roy Malcolm
major: School of Engineering
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Gaines, George William
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
clubs: Student Chapter A. S. C. E., 1, 2, 3, 4
description: The boy with a million "memories," has made numerous friends at Ole Miss by his ability and good nature. With his ready wit and likable traits we predict a bright future for him.
text: The boy with a million "memories," has made numerous friends at Ole Miss by his ability and good nature. With his ready wit and likable traits we predict a bright future for him.

name: Garner, P. E.
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
description: Garner spent two years at Auburn and one at A. & M., but decided to repent of his evil ways by finishing at Ole Miss. Although he has been with us only one year he has worked his way into the hearts of everyone.
text: Garner spent two years at Auburn and one at A. & M., but decided to repent of his evil ways by finishing at Ole Miss. Although he has been with us only one year he has worked his way into the hearts of everyone.

name: Godwin, Robert Hugh
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
description: Alternating between domestic duties and musical pursuits, besides wrestling with his course, have kept Hugh busy. But he has not been too much engaged to make many friends who value his acquaintance.
text: Alternating between domestic duties and musical pursuits, besides wrestling with his course, have kept Hugh busy. But he has not been too much engaged to make many friends who value his acquaintance.

name: Jarman, Junius Thomas
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
clubs: Student Chapter A. S. C. E., 1, 2, 3, 4
description: He is one who could sell ice cream cones to the Eskimos. Nevertheless, we feel sure that our president's name will be heard of in the future, allied with some great engineering feat.
text: He is one who could sell ice cream cones to the Eskimos. Nevertheless, we feel sure that our president's name will be heard of in the future, allied with some great engineering feat.

name: Jones, C. Edmondson
major: Bachelor of Engineering, School of Engineering
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Promotion Committee, 1
description: Noted for his sobriety, honored for his loyalty, cherished for his liberality, and respected for his sincerity—that's "Ced." Ole Miss' loss will certainly be a great gain to the Southland.
text: Noted for his sobriety, honored for his loyalty, cherished for his liberality, and respected for his sincerity—that's "Ced." Ole Miss' loss will certainly be a great gain to the Southland.

name: Sherman, Carleton W.
major: School of Engineering
description: Senior Class
text: Senior Class

name: Allen, Charles Branham Jr.
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law
description: "Duroc" represents the ideal college man—a splendid athlete, a Southern gentleman possessed of a democratic character; a true friend, and a learned student.
text: "Duroc" represents the ideal college man—a splendid athlete, a Southern gentleman possessed of a democratic character; a true friend, and a learned student.

name: Bell, James W. Jr.
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law, B. S. University of Mississippi
description: Always ready for a good bridge game or a date, he has been found very proficient in both. Now we are bidding "Sonnie" adieu, but who will forget that grand little man of the Class of '27?
text: Always ready for a good bridge game or a date, he has been found very proficient in both. Now we are bidding "Sonnie" adieu, but who will forget that grand little man of the Class of '27?

name: Bradshaw, Frederick William
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law
description: Fred is a true Southern gentleman—courteous, courageous, loyal, trustworthy, and true. A man among men, a dream among women, a clever actor, a talented musician, a brilliant student, a staunch friend, that of a great barrister is the only future worthy of him.
text: Fred is a true Southern gentleman—courteous, courageous, loyal, trustworthy, and true. A man among men, a dream among women, a clever actor, a talented musician, a brilliant student, a staunch friend, that of a great barrister is the only future worthy of him.

name: Cochran, Archer W.
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law
description: Archie has always been a jolly good fellow, a true friend, and a man of unusual latent ability. His many friends won at Ole Miss wish him the heights of success in the legal profession.
text: Archie has always been a jolly good fellow, a true friend, and a man of unusual latent ability. His many friends won at Ole Miss wish him the heights of success in the legal profession.

name: Conner, Dudley W.
major: Bachelor of Laws, School of Law
description: The star of the hard-hitting East Gordon football team, Dudley has proved his mettle as an athlete, student, and all-round good fellow. He carries the best wishes of his fellow-students for a brilliant success in the legal profession.
text: The star of the hard-hitting East Gordon football team, Dudley has proved his mettle as an athlete, student, and all-round good fellow. He carries the best wishes of his fellow-students for a brilliant success in the legal profession.

name: Cox, Charles Shephard
major: School of Law
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Leftwich, Frank Switzer
major: School of Law
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Phillips, Robert Pierce
major: School of Law
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Thames, James D. Jr.
major: School of Law
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Anderson, Edward Mayo
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: Mayo is assured of a successful future because he has those admirable qualities of character which only those of big calibre possess without effort. We hope that he will see fit to visit his Alma Mater quite often after he leaves us.
text: Mayo is assured of a successful future because he has those admirable qualities of character which only those of big calibre possess without effort. We hope that he will see fit to visit his Alma Mater quite often after he leaves us.

name: Anderson, William Eugene
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: "Spec"—another popular and well-known student with a nickname—will soon make his fraternity proud of him through his ability in his profession as diagnostician. If freckles count for dollars after one enters business, Spec will soon be a millionaire.
text: "Spec"—another popular and well-known student with a nickname—will soon make his fraternity proud of him through his ability in his profession as diagnostician. If freckles count for dollars after one enters business, Spec will soon be a millionaire.

name: Baugh, Douglas Davidson
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: Douglas has always been one to come through with the goods, whether assisting in Biology or surprising the campus with musical talent on Med-night. With his sly humor and geniality, he should make his mark as a baby specialist.
text: Douglas has always been one to come through with the goods, whether assisting in Biology or surprising the campus with musical talent on Med-night. With his sly humor and geniality, he should make his mark as a baby specialist.

name: Bunyard, Joe Alton
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: The "blushing blond" from Siwashee Junction will soon be listed as an honorable alumnus of Ole Miss. Although Bunyard doesn't live "sock up" in town, he has led us to believe every inch of that six feet one character he possesses. Who can fill his place?
text: The "blushing blond" from Siwashee Junction will soon be listed as an honorable alumnus of Ole Miss. Although Bunyard doesn't live "sock up" in town, he has led us to believe every inch of that six feet one character he possesses. Who can fill his place?

name: Butler, George Harrison
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: Harrison, from the quiet, modest city of McComb, does not believe the characteristics of his city. Optimistic and lively, he will not wait for the good of life but will go after it himself.
text: Harrison, from the quiet, modest city of McComb, does not believe the characteristics of his city. Optimistic and lively, he will not wait for the good of life but will go after it himself.

name: Busby, H. C.
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: After this year, Busby will display his knowledge to the learned doctors at Tulane. With the close application to his studies there as here we hope to hear of him as carrying off all honors.
text: After this year, Busby will display his knowledge to the learned doctors at Tulane. With the close application to his studies there as here we hope to hear of him as carrying off all honors.

name: Cole, Bonney Michael
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: Bonney started his collegiate career at A. & M., but soon realized his mistake and came to Ole Miss to study medicine. He is a good musician, a capable student and a sincere friend.
text: Bonney started his collegiate career at A. & M., but soon realized his mistake and came to Ole Miss to study medicine. He is a good musician, a capable student and a sincere friend.

name: East, Isaac Cooper
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: Although a pillar of the church, "Deacon" has made an excellent medical student. But stranger yet, after having made that, he still holds his position in the church.
text: Although a pillar of the church, "Deacon" has made an excellent medical student. But stranger yet, after having made that, he still holds his position in the church.

name: Coursey, Walter Mack
major: B.S., M.D., SCHOOL OF MEDICINE
description: It was a cold, dark night. The wind howled 'round the campfire. The boys said, "Mack, tell us a story." Mack's still telling his story. Besides being the most original man on the campus, Mack is its most interesting prevaricator.
text: It was a cold, dark night. The wind howled 'round the campfire. The boys said, "Mack, tell us a story." Mack's still telling his story. Besides being the most original man on the campus, Mack is its most interesting prevaricator.

name: Davis, Walter Dell
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Since the Fall of 1923, when Dell first honored the campus with his presence, he has worked his way through the Medical School and into the hearts of all his associates. He never lets his studies interfere with his college education, but he always manages to get his work done.
text: Since the Fall of 1923, when Dell first honored the campus with his presence, he has worked his way through the Medical School and into the hearts of all his associates. He never lets his studies interfere with his college education, but he always manages to get his work done.

name: Edmondson, H. E.
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Honest, honorable and Irish, are Red's credentials. What more could one wish of any man?
text: Honest, honorable and Irish, are Red's credentials. What more could one wish of any man?

name: Goodman, Henry Brown
major: B.S., M.D., School of Medicine
description: Cary gave one of its best when "Sonny-boy" was sent to Ole Miss. With Santa Claus ever as an ideal, Sonny is bound to succeed.
text: Cary gave one of its best when "Sonny-boy" was sent to Ole Miss. With Santa Claus ever as an ideal, Sonny is bound to succeed.

name: Farris, James Martin
major: School of Medicine
description: Senior Class
text: Senior Class

name: Ward, James Purnell
major: School of Medicine
description: Senior Class.
text: Senior Class.

name: Armstrong, S. K., Jr.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
clubs: Member of Executive Council of Student Body, 3
description: In this blushing youth we have a man of sterling character and personality. We are indeed proud of Forky and his honors. With his thorough knowledge of Pharmacy we are sure of his future success.
text: In this blushing youth we have a man of sterling character and personality. We are indeed proud of Forky and his honors. With his thorough knowledge of Pharmacy we are sure of his future success.

name: Branscome, Dexter Arno, Jr.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: Branscome has been a pillar of strength to all that is good for the Pharmacy School and Ole Miss. In the future we expect to see him the most prominent "pillar" of some prosperous community.
text: Branscome has been a pillar of strength to all that is good for the Pharmacy School and Ole Miss. In the future we expect to see him the most prominent "pillar" of some prosperous community.

name: Butler, Stewart H.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, B.S. Degree, 1920, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
clubs: Mayo Prize for Best General Average in First Year Pharmacy, 4
description: Butler is the possessor of one of the keenest intellects at Ole Miss. He has served as instructor in chemistry which fact attests his ability. He does all things excellently and believes that doing is better than saying.
text: Butler is the possessor of one of the keenest intellects at Ole Miss. He has served as instructor in chemistry which fact attests his ability. He does all things excellently and believes that doing is better than saying.

name: Combs, John Weathers, Jr.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: One of the finest boys on the campus hails from Terry in the person of Combs. Quiet, yet very influential man, and a character that demands respect. We wish for him as much success in business as he has enjoyed in the University.
text: One of the finest boys on the campus hails from Terry in the person of Combs. Quiet, yet very influential man, and a character that demands respect. We wish for him as much success in business as he has enjoyed in the University.

name: Ford, Roy W.
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: Ford is one of the hardest workers in his class and has never been known to be late or intentionally cut one of his classes. He is the Senior married man in the School of Pharmacy.
text: Ford is one of the hardest workers in his class and has never been known to be late or intentionally cut one of his classes. He is the Senior married man in the School of Pharmacy.

name: Furr, Edward Allison
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Finance Committee, 3
description: Another "Tupelo flash" has come to Ole Miss and made good. We wish him as much success in the profession of pill-rolling as he has enjoyed at Ole Miss.
text: Another "Tupelo flash" has come to Ole Miss and made good. We wish him as much success in the profession of pill-rolling as he has enjoyed at Ole Miss.

name: Max McCall Millstead
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
clubs: Member Y. M. C. A. Finance Committee, 3
description: Max worked hard to get through and now that he has attained his diploma we expect him to make a success. He's cheerful and good natured and has many friends.
text: Max worked hard to get through and now that he has attained his diploma we expect him to make a success. He's cheerful and good natured and has many friends.

name: David Brown Permenter
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: "Pert" is a hard worker and diligent student who would weep if his grades fell below "A." He occasionally springs a few surprises, but the greatest was when he appeared on the campus with his wife last Fall.
text: "Pert" is a hard worker and diligent student who would weep if his grades fell below "A." He occasionally springs a few surprises, but the greatest was when he appeared on the campus with his wife last Fall.

name: Spencer Frierson Pettis
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: Pettis became a friend to us all when he first got here. If he doesn't make good in pharmacy, it is because nobody wants pharmacists at all.
text: Pettis became a friend to us all when he first got here. If he doesn't make good in pharmacy, it is because nobody wants pharmacists at all.

name: Allen Akin Walker
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: Allen, who hails from the prairie section of Mississippi, is a good sport and a fellow well liked by both sexes on the campus. He started his college career with the Engineers, but after a brief period turned Pharmacist, which move he will demonstrate to be a wise one in after years.
text: Allen, who hails from the prairie section of Mississippi, is a good sport and a fellow well liked by both sexes on the campus. He started his college career with the Engineers, but after a brief period turned Pharmacist, which move he will demonstrate to be a wise one in after years.

name: Lea Maxwell Whitaker
major: Graduate in Pharmacy, SCHOOL OF PHARMACY
description: A better man would be hard to find—always a smile for every one. The same traits that have won Max friends here will insure him all the rewards of the days to come.
text: A better man would be hard to find—always a smile for every one. The same traits that have won Max friends here will insure him all the rewards of the days to come.
